headline: Why The AbbVie (ABBV) Story Is Shifting As Immunology Hopes Meet Valuation Doubts
summary: AbbVie’s fair value price target sits at US$249.14 in this update, with no change to the central valuation estimate. Behind that steady figure is a mixed analyst backdrop, where bulls point to the immunology pipeline and potential operating leverage, while bears question how much upside remains after recent volatility and competitive concerns. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving AbbVie story and what to watch next. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: BOTOX® Cosmetic (onabotulinumtoxinA) Empowers Women Entrepreneurs Through "The Confidence Collective" for Fourth Year
summary: Allergan Aesthetics, an AbbVie company (NYSE: ABBV), today announced that applications are now open for The Confidence Collective: Empowering Women Entrepreneurs, an ongoing initiative from BOTOX® Cosmetic dedicated to uplifting and investing in businessowners. Applications are open now through April 29, 2026.

headline: Can AbbVie’s (ABBV) New Dermatology Data Quietly Reshape Its Immunology-Heavy Investment Story?
summary: In late March 2026, AbbVie showcased extensive new dermatology research at the American Academy of Dermatology meeting, highlighting long-term outcomes, safety, and quality-of-life data for Skyrizi (risankizumab) and Rinvoq (upadacitinib), along with early Phase 3 results in vitiligo and alopecia areata where upadacitinib is not yet FDA approved. A key development was the FDA’s recent update of Skyrizi’s U.S. Prescribing Information to include genital and scalp psoriasis data, underlining...
